challenges.title: 2000 Push-Up Challenge
challenges.description: Accumulate 2,000 push-ups over the course of the challenge. Build serious upper-body strength, mental discipline, and endurance with scalable daily targets.

challenges.title: 100km Run Challenge
challenges.description: Run a total of 100 kilometers within the challenge period. Designed to build consistency, cardiovascular endurance, and mental toughness at your own pace.

challenges.title: Plank Hold Endurance
challenges.description: Strengthen your core with progressive plank holds. Improve posture, stability, and total-body control with daily time-based goals.

challenges.title: Full Body Consistency
challenges.description: A balanced full-body challenge focused on daily movement. Perfect for building habits, improving overall fitness, and staying active without burnout.
